transcript: Speaker A: Introducing the English test designed for you. Convenient, fast, affordable, and trusted by top universities around the world. Experience a better way to certify your English with the Duolingo English Test.
summary: The ad promotes the Duolingo English Test as a fast, affordable, and university-trusted certification method. It uses simple animations to show the ease of testing from home. Viewers are directed to englishtest.duolingo.com to get started.
